untranslatable_reason: The signal requires tracking of previous swing highs/lows with lookback_periods=20 and confirmation over 2 consecutive bars. The allowed indicators do not include a 'swing high/low detector' or multi-bar confirmation mechanism. Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) approximate new highs/lows but do not precisely match the swing-high semantics described. The confirmation requirement (2 consecutive bars above swing high) cannot be expressed without array indexing or a dedicated confirmation indicator.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using Donchian channels as a proxy for new directional signals (new highs/lows), but the exact swing-high logic with 2-bar confirmation cannot be fully captured with the available indicators. A custom swing-high detector would be needed for precise implementation.
